name: No-Sugar Fruit/Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chopped dates, raisins, and dried cranberries in a saucepan with water. Bring to boil and boil for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in margarine and salt. Set aside to cool.
3. Add remaining ingredients (egg beaters, vanilla extract) to the cooled fruit mixture; stir until dry ingredients are just moistened.
4. Spoon batter into greased mini-muffin pans (12 regular muffin tins).
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes, or bake in a greased 11 x 7 x 2-inch pan for 30 minutes.
Yield: 32 mini-muffins (or 12 regular size muffins)
These were FANTASTIC! I had tasted them when Sally made them using her recipe...and they were really wonderful!! But I wanted to lower the fat a bit more and adapted the recipe a bit more. I think they are excellent.
